generic_description: Search all active listings across categories using keyword, location, and category-aware fields.
implementation_note: Generic search bar with category selector and location radius.

generic_description: Browse inventory by product category while reusing the same listing-card and filter architecture.
Let users save filter combinations and return to them later.
implementation_note: Store query, category, filters, radius, sort.

generic_description: Notify users when new or updated listings match saved search criteria.
implementation_note: Email/push later; MVP can be in-app.

generic_description: Suggest categories, brands, models, attributes, and locations as users type.
implementation_note: Use generic labels: brand, model, attribute, location.

generic_description: Show users listings they opened recently for fast comparison.
implementation_note: Do not require account for local-only history.

generic_description: Promote selected listings without changing the base card schema.
implementation_note: Keep paid/pinned status separate from organic ranking.

generic_description: Group inventory into practical buyer intents such as commuter, work-ready, family, collectible, creator, travel, or budget.
implementation_note: Generic intent tags, not vehicle-only labels.

generic_description: Prioritize listings available near the user’s selected location.
implementation_note: Support local pickup, delivery zone, or digital fulfillment.

generic_description: Allow users to expand beyond local inventory.
Show listings with comparable brand/model/price/condition/attributes.
Highlight fresh inventory to create urgency and improve browsing.
implementation_note: Use listedAt or activatedAt, not createdAt alone.

generic_description: Filter by minimum and maximum price.
Filter by estimated recurring payment instead of cash price.
Filter by manufacturer, creator, publisher, label, or comparable brand field.
implementation_note: Expose as Brand in generic UI.

generic_description: Filter by product line, series, edition, or model.
Filter by production year, release year, edition year, or model year.
Filter by new, used, certified, refurbished, damaged, open-box, or digital-original status.
implementation_note: Values are category-specific but label remains generic.

generic_description: Filter by distance from ZIP/city.
Filter dealer/store, private seller, verified seller, platform-owned, partner, or creator.
implementation_note: Avoid car-only dealer language in reusable UI.

generic_description: Filter by available now, coming soon, reserved, pending, sold, archived.
implementation_note: Status labels should come from schema.

generic_description: Filter by delivery, pickup, shipping, local meet, instant access, or appointment required.
Filter by category-defined features such as transmission, format, size, genre, material, resolution, medium, or license.
Default sorting based on query match, location, inventory quality, and status.
Sort low-to-high or high-to-low.
Sort by activated/listed date.
implementation_note: Avoid confusing modified date with new listing.

generic_description: Sort nearest first for physical inventory.
Sort based on price rating or market comparison.
implementation_note: Label as value signal, not guaranteed savings.

generic_description: Show active filters as removable chips above results.
Suggest removing filters or widening radius when search has no matches.
Responsive card grid showing image, title, price, location, core attributes, and primary CTA.
implementation_note: Same card contract for all categories.

generic_description: Alternate dense view for comparison-heavy browsing.
Show badges like Great Value, New Arrival, Verified, Certified, Delivery Available, Digital Access.
Show clean thumbnails with fallback image handling.
Allow quick scan of multiple media assets from the results page.
implementation_note: Support photos, cover art, screenshots, or stills.

generic_description: Save listings to a personal shortlist.
Let users select multiple listings for side-by-side comparison.
Open important listing details without leaving the results page.
implementation_note: Drawer uses same safe projection as list/detail policy.

generic_description: Show seller/store/creator profile entry point.
Show distance for physical listings or access mode for digital listings.
implementation_note: Example: 12 mi away, Ships nationwide, Instant access.

generic_description: Flag listings with recent price reductions.
Clearly mark unavailable listings while preserving user context.
Large photo/media gallery with thumbnails and full-screen viewing.
implementation_note: Works for product photos, videos, covers, previews.

generic_description: Prominent title assembled from brand, model/product line, trim/edition, year/version.
Display 4-8 top facts in a scannable summary row.
Expandable full specification table.
Explain condition, inspection notes, defects, wear, completeness, or digital quality.
Show provenance, ownership, certification, source, history report, or authenticity documentation.
implementation_note: Category-specific provider names hidden behind generic contract.

generic_description: Summarize seller, rating, location, response behavior, and verification.
Show delivery, pickup, shipping, appointment, download, transfer, or licensing options.
Show item price, fees, taxes estimate, delivery/shipping, credits, incentives, and total estimate.
Show estimated recurring payment when financing/subscription applies.
Lead/contact form, message seller, call, request info, or start purchase.
Begin checkout/reservation/deposit flow from detail page.
implementation_note: Can be disabled by category or seller.

generic_description: Book viewing, pickup, demo, test use, consultation, or inspection.
Generate shareable URL and native share options.
Allow users to flag fraud, inaccurate info, sold item, duplicate, or unsafe content.
Show comparable items below the detail page.
Show recently viewed inventory for easy backtracking.
Keep price and CTAs visible while scrolling.
implementation_note: Desktop side rail; mobile bottom bar.

generic_description: Compare selected listings by price, condition, specs, fulfillment, seller, and value signal.
Rate listed price relative to comparable inventory.
Show price changes over time.
Estimate full cost including fees, taxes, delivery/shipping, subscription, license, or transfer.
implementation_note: Avoid exact claims unless data is known.

generic_description: Explain why an item is marked good value or high price.
Educational content for category, brand, condition, pricing, and fulfillment.
Show high-demand saved searches or trending category filters.
Show low stock, popular listing, high views, or rare configuration.
Give buyers a category-aware checklist of what to verify before purchase.
Estimate ongoing costs like maintenance, storage, subscription, renewal, or accessories.
User profile for saved searches, favorites, alerts, messages, and purchase progress.
List saved items with status, price changes, and availability.
View, edit, delete, and enable alerts for saved searches.
Account-level list of recently viewed inventory.
Basic buyer-side record of inquiries and seller replies.
Show steps like reserved, documents, payment, fulfillment, complete.
Upload ID, proof, forms, certificates, licenses, or other purchase docs.
Verify buyer where required for high-value or regulated categories.
Let users choose email/push/SMS for saved searches, messages, purchase updates.
Track sellers/items the user has contacted.
Create listings from CSV/API/manual entry.
Edit title, price, specs, media, condition, fulfillment, and seller notes.
Upload, reorder, crop, caption, and validate listing media.

generic_description: Show missing fields, media, price, fulfillment, and category-specific blockers.
Track draft, ready, published, pending, failed, paused, archived.
Send listings to owned marketplace, partner channels, feeds, and embeds.
Score completeness of media, description, specs, price, and trust docs.
implementation_note: Guide improvement, not buyer-facing unless intentional.

generic_description: Apply price, status, fulfillment, category, or seller updates across many listings.
Detect duplicate listings by source ID, canonical identity, media, or core specs.
Show active listings, leads, saves, views, price changes, publish health.
implementation_note: Keep BI aggregate, not full CRM.

generic_description: Route contact requests to seller email/webhook/export without owning full sales workflow.
Track views, saves, clicks, contacts, channel impact, and confidence.
Compare inventory movement across channels and marketplace surfaces.
Manage public seller bio, logo, contact options, locations, fulfillment settings.
Indicate sellers who passed verification.
Warn users about suspicious pricing, off-platform payment, mismatched details, or duplicate media.
